title: Novel 12-epi-mutilin compounds, process for preparing the same and uses thereof
abstract: A compound of formula I (I), wherein R 0 is C1 or I, preferably C1; a process for preparing said compound as well as use of said compound and a process for preparing 12-epi-mutilin derivatives.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A compound of formula I wherein R 0 is C1 or I. 2. A compound according to claim 1, wherein R 0 is C1. 3. A compound according to claim 2, in crystalline form. 4. A compound according to any one of claims 1 to 3 in a diastereomeric mixture with a compound of formula II wherein R 0 is C1 or I, wherein the diastereomeric ratio between the compound of formula I and the compound of formula II is 80:20 or higher, preferably 90: 10 or higher and more preferably 95:5 or higher. 5. Process for preparing a compound of formula I according to any one of claims 1 to 4, the process comprising a step of isolating a compound of formula I as solid, preferably in crystalline form. 6. Process according to claim 5, wherein the compound of formula l is a compound according to formula Ici and the step of isolating the compound of formula I includes at least one step of crystallizing and isolating the compound of formula I in crystalline form. 7. Process according to claim 6, wherein the step of crystallizing the compound of formula Ici is performed starting from a reaction mixture comprising a compound of formula Ici and a compound of formula IIci 8. Process according to claim 7, wherein the reaction mixture comprising a compound of formula Ici and a compound of formula IIci is obtained by the steps of: providing a compound of formula III epimerizing a compound of formula III to obtain a mixture of a compound of formula III and a compound of formula IV substituting the tosylate group of the mixture of the compound of formula III and the compound of formula IV with a chloride group using an inorganic chloride to obtain 

 a reaction mixture comprising a compound of formula Ici and a compound of formula IIci. 9. Process according to claim 7, wherein the reaction mixture comprising a compound of formula Ici and a compound of formula IIci is obtained by the steps of: - providing a compound of formula III substituting the tosylate group of the compound of formula III with a chloride group using an inorganic chloride to obtain a compound of formula IIci; and epimerizing a compound of formula IIci to obtain a mixture of a compound of formula Ici and a compound of formula IIci. 10. Process according to any one of claims 6 to 9, wherein at least one step of crystallizing includes seeding with a compound of formula Ici in crystalline form. 11. Process according to any one of claims 6 to 10, wherein the step of crystallizing is repeated more than once. 12. Process according to any one of claims 6 to 11, wherein at least one step of crystallizing is carried out in an organic solvent comprising an aromatic apolar solvent, preferably toluene, or an alcoholic solvent, preferably selected from the group comprising methanol, ethanol, isopropanol, and butanol. 13. Process according to claim 5, wherein the compound of formula I is a compound according to formula Ii and the process comprises the steps of: providing a compound of formula Ici reacting a compound of formula Ici with a iodide salt, preferably in an aprotic, polar organic solvent, and isolating the compound of formula Ii as solid. 14. Use of a compound of formula I wherein R 0 is C1 or I, preferably C1, in a process of preparing a 12-epi-mutilin derivative. 15. Use according to claim 14, wherein the 12-epi-mutilin derivative is a compound comprising formula V wherein: Ri is an organic group comprising 1 to 16 carbon atoms, optionally comprising one or more heteroatoms selected from N, O, S, halogen, in particular N; X is sulfur or oxygen, preferably sulfur; and R2 is an organic group comprising 1 to 22 carbon atoms, optionally comprising heteroatoms selected from N, O, S, and halogen. 16. Process for preparing 12-epi-mutilin derivatives, the process comprising: providing a compound of formula I wherein R 0 is C1; subsequently at least two steps of chemical processing, wherein a moiety R 1 and a moiety R 2 -X are introduced independently to each other; isolating a 12-epi-mutilin derivative, wherein the 12-epi-mutilin derivative is a compound of formula V wherein: R 1 is an organic group comprising 1 to 16 carbon atoms, optionally comprising one or more heteroatoms selected from N, O, S, halogen, in particular N; X is sulfur or oxygen, preferably sulfur; and R 1 is an organic group comprising 1 to 22 carbon atoms, optionally comprising one or more heteroatoms selected from N, O, S, and halogen. 17. Use of a compound of formula I according to claim 14 or 15 or process for preparing 12- epi-mutilin derivatives according to claim 16, wherein Ro is Cl and the compound of formula I is provided in crystalline form. 18. Use of a compound of formula I according to any one of claims 14, 15 or 17 or process for preparing 12-epi-mutilin derivatives according to any one of claims 16 to 17, comprising reacting a compound of formula I, wherein Ro is Cl, with a iodide salt, preferably in an aprotic, polar organic solvent, and 

 isolating a compound of formula I, wherein R 0 is I. 19. Use of a compound of formula I according to claim 18 or process for preparing 12-epi- mutilin derivatives according to claim 18, comprising converting the compound of formula I, wherein R 0 is I, into a compound of formula
